## 🌸 GSSoC Task Overview

**Task Level:** <!-- Choose one: Level 1 / Level 2 / Level 3 -->
- **Level 1** (10 points): Documentation, minor bug fixes, small UI tweaks
- **Level 2** (25 points): New features, components, API endpoints
- **Level 3** (45 points): Major features, architecture changes

**Task Category:**
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Bug Fix
- [ ] Feature Enhancement
- [ ] UI/UX Improvement
- [ ] Backend API
- [ ] Testing
- [ ] Other

Describe the task in detail.

## ✅ Acceptance Criteria
List what needs to be done for this task to be considered complete.
- [ ] Criterion 1
- [ ] Criterion 2
- [ ] Criterion 3

## 🎯 Expected Outcome
What should the result look like?

## 📚 Resources
- Relevant documentation links
- Code references
- Design mockups

## 💬 Discussion
